description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 6 hrs 24 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 5 hrs 9 mins across 5 projects. His most-used languages were Java, Markdown, TypeScript, and JSON, with Java accounting for 26% of the time and Markdown 22%. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded in the provided data.
